LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF ALIPHCOM, INC. D/B/A JAWBONE'S MOTION TO SEAL PLAINTIFFS DESIGNATION OF TRADE SECRETS AND EXHIBITS THERETO IS CONDITIONALLY GRANTED. THE COURT ORDERS THE PARTIES TO MEET AND CONFER IN GOOD FAITH TO ADDRESS DEFENDANTS' CONCERNS THAT NON-CONFIDENTIAL MATTER HAS BEEN INAPPROPRIATELY SEALED. IF AN AGREEMENT IS REACHED, AN AMENDED SEALING ORDER CAN BE PRESENTED TO THE COURT FOR REVIEW. IF AN AGREEMENT CANNOT BE REACHED, A FURTHER HEARING BEFORE THE DISCOVERY REFEREE IS TO BE SCHEDULED. THE SEALING ORDER WILL EXPIRE ONCE TRIAL IS COMMENCED UNLESS IT IS APPROVED BY THE TRIAL JUDGE VIA A MOTION IN LIMINE. THE PREVAILING PARTY IS TO PROVIDE A FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: ERNEST GOLDSMITH. CLERK: ROSIE NOGUERA. REPORTER: JOANNA BROADWELL, CSR #10959, 415-274-9977. (302/EG)
